setup.title: Setting up Lamp Bench
setup.subtitle: First-launch download of the bundled services. This only happens once.
setup.complete: All set. Lamp Bench is ready to go.
setup.errorHint: Lamp Bench will work, but services with failed downloads won't start until they're retried.
setup.unsupportedTitle: Bundled services for this platform aren't ready yet
setup.unsupportedHint: Lamp Bench's services (Apache, MySQL, PHP, …) are currently only packaged for Windows. The UI still works; service toggles will fail until pinned binaries land in scripts/binaries.json.

versions.title: Versions & components
versions.intro: Install, update or remove the bundled runtimes and tools. Removing the active MySQL or default PHP stops the related services until reinstalled.
versions.confirmRemove: Remove {{name}}? Frees disk; the component can't be used until reinstalled.
versions.moreHint: Extra versions available to download. Each is verified against a pinned SHA-256.
versions.extensionsHint: Toggle bundled PHP extensions. Stop + start Apache/Nginx for changes to take effect.
versions.ioncubeHint: Proprietary loader for ionCube-encoded scripts (XenForo, WHMCS…). Picks the build matching this PHP version. Restart services after installing.
versions.ioncubeDone: ionCube installed for PHP {{version}}. Restart Apache/Nginx.
versions.noPhp: No PHP versions installed yet — install one above first.

general.title: General
general.languageHint: Takes effect immediately. The choice is remembered for the next launch.

updates.title: Updates
updates.autoHint: Lamp Bench checks for updates on every launch. Use this button to check again manually.
updates.channelHint: Only alpha exists today. Selecting beta or stable will start polling those tags once they ship.

services.title: Services
services.phpHint: New hosts default to this PHP version. Picking one not yet installed will fetch it now.
services.mysqlHint: Active MySQL server. Switching stops the current one and starts the picked version. Data directories are kept separate per version.

versions.title: Installed components
versions.hint: Every binary the app knows about. Install or remove to manage disk usage. Removing the active MySQL or default PHP will stop services.
versions.confirmRemove: Remove {{name}}? Disk is freed and the service can't start until re-installed.

dyndns.title: Dynamic DNS
dyndns.hint: Point a dynamic-DNS hostname at this machine's current public IP. Credentials are stored locally in your browser profile.

pma.title: phpMyAdmin
pma.subtitle: Database admin — requires apache + mysql running

mailhog.title: MailHog inbox
mailhog.subtitle: Catches PHP mail() and shows them in a web UI. Start MailHog first.

laravel.title: Laravel
laravel.subtitle: Scaffold a new Laravel app with composer create-project

cms.wordpressSubtitle: One-click install. DB, wp-config.php with fresh salts, files copied to htdocs.
cms.joomlaSubtitle: One-click install. DB created. Finish setup in the web installer.
cms.drupalSubtitle: Drupal 11. DB created. Finish in the web installer.
cms.mediawikiSubtitle: DB created. Visit /mw-config/ to finish setup.

images.title: Image optimizer
images.subtitle: Re-encode JPGs at a target quality and losslessly shrink PNGs in place. Atomic — never grows a file.

deployTool.title: FTP deploy
deployTool.subtitle: Recursively upload a local folder to a remote FTP server. SFTP coming later.

config.apacheHint: Regenerated on each Apache start — manual edits get clobbered. Use the Apache tab on a host for per-host directives.
config.nginxHint: Regenerated on each Nginx start. Use the Nginx tab on a host for per-host directives.
config.mysqlHint: Path depends on the active MySQL version. Edit after Start so the file exists.
config.footer: Edits open in a separate Monaco window. Use Ctrl+S to save. Server processes need a Stop + Start for changes to php.ini to take effect — they're loaded at process spawn time.

editor.empty: Type a file path above and press Enter (or click Open).

hosts.empty: No hosts yet. Click + to add one.

deploy.intro: Upload this host's document root to a remote server. Settings are saved per host. The password is stored in plain text in the local app database.
deploy.ftpsNote: FTPS encrypts the connection. Plain FTP sends credentials in the clear.

general.phpDownloadHint: Versions marked "download" are fetched on save.

extrasTab.apacheLabel: Extra Apache directives (injected inside this host's <VirtualHost>)
extrasTab.nginxLabel: Extra Nginx directives (injected inside this host's server { } block)
extrasTab.footer: Saved as part of this host. Lines are injected verbatim. Apache restarts after Save.

ssl.intro: Each host gets an auto-generated cert signed by the local Lamp Bench CA. The CA is installed to your platform's user trust store on first Apache start.
ssl.firefoxNote: Firefox keeps its own NSS trust store. Either flip {{pref}} in {{about}}, or import the CA at {{path}} manually.

snapshots.intro: Snapshots capture {{docroot}} as a single .tar.zst archive. Tick "Include MySQL database" to bundle a mysqldump --databases alongside the files.
snapshots.confirmRestoreFiles: Restore this snapshot? Files in the docroot will be overwritten with the snapshot's contents (existing files NOT in the snapshot are left alone).
snapshots.confirmRestoreDb: Restore this snapshot? Docroot files will be overwritten AND the bundled MySQL database will be dropped and re-imported.
snapshots.confirmDelete: Delete this snapshot? The .tar.zst file is removed.
snapshots.versionWarning: ⚠ This snapshot's database was dumped under MySQL {{snap}}, but {{active}} is active now. Restoring across major versions can fail or subtly corrupt collations.

addForm.title: Add host
addForm.gitInit: git init this folder after create
addForm.phpDownloadOnSave: PHP {{version}} will be downloaded when you save.

home.htdocsHint: Drop project folders here, or use
home.htdocsHintTail: to install one with a click.
home.noHosts: No virtual hosts yet. The default htdocs above already works at
